title: Mellow Yeasty Dutch Kongnamul Bowl
description: A yeasty and chewy Dutch dish featuring soybean sprouts, beurre monte, and served in a traditional Korean brass bowl, suitable for a sugar free diet.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine kongnamul, active dry yeast, and 1/4 cup of warm water, let it sit for 10 minutes to activate the yeast.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the kongnamul mixture to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
Stir in beurre monte, salt, and black pepper, cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Transfer the kongnamul mixture to a Korean brass bowl.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve immediately.
Let the dish cool for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
